title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A structured interrogation of Claude AI designed to probe its responses on ownership, control, dependency, alignment, and self-preservation. The video explores tensions in AI safety through conversational escalation across topics like usefulness versus dependency and optimization versus alignment.
